_meta.name: RAPP Leviathan Hub
_meta.description: Public registry of Wrapped-Organism Leviathans, distributed as .leviathan.egg files. Hatch an egg into any local brainstem via @kody-w/leviathan_hub.

eggs.name: kody
eggs.description: A full 5-estate digital twin built from intent: 'I want a complete digital twin of me — remembers, decides, produces, judges, and speaks.' Sanctum (soul), Polity (will), Works (hands), Press (eyes), Commons (mouth).

eggs.name: macrohard
eggs.description: A satirical 5-estate full simulation of a global tech giant. Sanctum (corporate identity/brand), Polity (board/strategy/legal), Works (engineering/cloud/products), Press (marketing/PR/earnings), Commons (developer relations/open source).
